name: E-Dragon Stormfly Gaming Case – White
highlights: The E-Dragon Stormfly Gaming Case is an exceptional choice for gamers seeking a stylish and functional PC case
Featuring dual tempered glass panels, it supports M-ATX motherboards and accommodates up to 6 RGB fans for optimal cooling
With 2 HDD and 2 SSD slots and 240mm liquid cooler support , this gaming case ensures ample storage and performance
Ideal for those building a gaming PC, it stands out among gaming cases in Pakistan for its quality and affordability
